items.question: Which stage primarily teaches next-token prediction on broad text?
items.explanation: Pretraining learns language and knowledge patterns from large corpora before assistant-specific tuning.

items.question: What is the main purpose of supervised fine-tuning for Claude?
options: Add real-time web browsing to every model
Teach instruction-following chat behavior from curated examples
Replace the need for a context window
items.answer: Teach instruction-following chat behavior from curated examples
items.explanation: SFT shapes the model into an assistant that responds to user prompts in expected formats.

items.question: RLHF and RLAIF primarily improve:
options: Alignment with human preferences and safety principles
The size of the tokenizer vocabulary only
items.answer: Alignment with human preferences and safety principles
items.explanation: Feedback training steers outputs toward preferred, safer behavior beyond imitation alone.

items.question: After a model is released, does a normal chat message retrain its weights?
options: Yes, every message updates weights globally
No—inference uses fixed weights for that model version
items.answer: No—inference uses fixed weights for that model version
items.explanation: Training is offline; chats consume the released checkpoint unless you switch to a newer model.
